entry.title: Effect of dietary supplementation with

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: H SAMTI - Acta Veterinaria Hungarica, 2026

Abstract: ... The objective of the present study was to evaluate the effect of dietary supplementation with the prebiotic Saccharomyces cerevisiae yeast on testicular width and semen quality in rabbit bucks. Twenty-four male rabbits were randomly ...

entry.title: Effect of Sequential Extraction Methods on the Structure and In Vitro Fermentation Characteristics of the Polysaccharides from Sea Buckthorn Pomace

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: B Bai, C Yu, W Wang, L Jiang, Z Yang, J Chen, X Ye... - Journal of Agricultural and ..., 2026

Abstract: ... Polysaccharides derived from sea buckthorn pomace are bioactive compounds that can undergo intestinal fermentation and exert prebiotic effects. However, the influence of sequential extraction on their structural properties and prebiotic activity ...

entry.title: The Prebiotic Role of Algal Polysaccharides and Their Impact on Gut Microbiome Composition and Function

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: S Palanivishwanath, S Nagappan, K Tripathi, S Mishra - Advances in Algal Research, 2026

Abstract: Prebiotics are non-digestible food components that benefit the host by selectively stimulating the growth and activity of beneficial gut microbiota. Algal polysaccharides, such as fucoidan, alginate, agar, carrageenan, and xylan, are complex ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Valorization of mung bean meal by-product through extraction and characterization of homogalacturonan-rich pectin with prebiotic -like and α-amylase inhibitory ...

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: C Sonklin, J Tosing, S Limsumphan, K Permpool... - Journal of Food ..., 2026

Abstract: Mung bean meal, a by-product of vermicelli production, represents an underutilized yet promising source of value-added polysaccharides. This study aimed to develop a sequential aqueous extraction process using NaOH and HCl (pH 11 and 2 ...

entry.title: Uniform Reinterpretation of Rocky Exoplanet Secondary Eclipse Observations and the Impact of Stellar and Orbital Uncertainties
entry.content:
Authors: C Monaghan, B Benneke, NJ Connors, LP Coulombe... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: Secondary eclipse observations are a powerful way to investigate whether or not a rocky exoplanet hosts an atmosphere, as an atmospheric presence would transport heat to the nightside and render the dayside colder than anticipated. The ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

entry.title: Alterity and Human Evolution: Deep-Time and Multispecies Perspectives on Difference and Variation
entry.content:
Authors: P Bickle, R Ygua, FWF Foulds, LG Freeman, A Adolph...

Abstract: Engaging critically with concepts of race, species, and otherness, this book contributes to current debates on human evolution. In a political climate marked by movements such as Black Lives Matter and policies like Donald Trump's Executive ...
